description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in an orange short-sleeve shirt with a V-neck and visible stains on the right shoulder, paired with olive green pants. He wears a matching orange cap and orange slip-on shoes, and his wrists and forearms are adorned with black bands and metallic handcuffs, suggesting a prisoner or detainee. The back of the shirt features partially visible white text. His hands are open and fingers slightly spread, and his facial expression is neutral. The figure's build is average, and the clothing fits loosely, with the pants tucked into the shoes. The overall appearance is that of a restrained individual, likely intended to represent a prisoner or detainee in an urban context.
description: An adult male in loose orange attire with handcuffs, cap, and olive pants, resembling a restrained prisoner or detainee.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange shirt with stains, cap, handcuffs, and open hands, with facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, shirt, and pants, with handcuffs and bands visible on the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the shirt with white text, both handcuffs, and the overall fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm's stains, handcuffs, and the side profile of the cap and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve shirt, casual pants, slip-on shoes, cap, wristbands, handcuffs
